content:
2025-12-18

- [x] Vendor walkthrough at Emerald Hall — notes in [[Rodriguez Quinceañera]]
- [ ] Call Mary Jensen re: waltz schedule
- [ ] Send Fuentes family contract draft
- Floor plan looks good. DJ booth fits without blocking the court of honor entrance.

2025-12-17

- Reviewed [[Fuentes Quinceañera]] intake notes — mariachi confirmed for cocktail hour.
- Reminded Carmen Davidson about Oct 3 walkthrough.

2025-12-15

- Checked [[Vendor contacts]] for Las Palmas catering options.
- Isabella dance recital Dec 11 — block calendar.

Rodriguez Quinceañera

Date: October 17, 2026 — 5 PM
Venue: Emerald Hall, 4500 W Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas NV 89103
Guest count: 120
Theme: Rose gold and white
Honoree: Mariana Rodriguez

## Status
- Contract signed.
- Deposit paid.
- Venue walkthrough Oct 3 at 10 AM.

## Open items
- [ ] Final waltz choreography schedule from Mary Jensen
- [ ] DJ playlist due Sept 30
- [ ] Catering final headcount due Oct 10

## Vendors
- Photography: [[Vendor contacts#Carmen Davidson]]
- Choreography: [[Vendor contacts#Mary Jensen]]

Fuentes Quinceañera

Date: November 14, 2026 — 5 PM
Venue: Las Palmas Banquet Hall, 8380 W Sahara Ave, Las Vegas NV 89117
Guest count: 90 (estimated)
Honoree: Camila Fuentes

## Status
- Intake call complete March 2026.
- Contract pending signature.

## Open items
- [ ] Send DocuSign contract
- [ ] Confirm mariachi band availability
- [ ] Finalize catering menu

Vendor contacts

## Carmen Davidson
- Photography
- Phone: +17022560256
- Email: carmen.davidson@gmail.com
- Rate: $1,800 full event

## Mary Jensen
- Choreography / waltz coaching
- Phone: +17022560263
- Email: mary.jensen@gmail.com
- Rate: $400 per rehearsal block

## Father Frank Harris
- Our Lady of Las Vegas parish
- Phone: +17022560270
- Email: frank.harris@ourladyoflv.org
- Available for blessing ceremony coordination

Day-of checklist template

## Morning
- [ ] Confirm venue access time with coordinator
- [ ] Decor team arrival and setup
- [ ] Florist delivery confirmed
- [ ] Photographer briefed on shot list

## Afternoon
- [ ] Court of honor dress rehearsal walkthrough
- [ ] DJ / sound check
- [ ] Catering setup inspection
- [ ] Honoree hair and makeup timeline confirmed

## Event
- [ ] Guest check-in table staffed
- [ ] Processional cue sheet with DJ
- [ ] Candle ceremony props staged
- [ ] Last dance cue coordinated with DJ

## Wrap-up
- [ ] Tip envelopes distributed to vendors
- [ ] Personal items collected from dressing room
- [ ] Final invoice sent within 48 hours

- Check if Las Palmas has parking for 90 guests
- Ask Carmen if she does video too or just stills
